titles.title: God is so Good (You are Worthy)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v2 v12

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: No height or depth can separate Your steadfast love we can't escape Your faithfulness, an endless sea So full of grace and mercy We sing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is so good God is so good God is so good He's so good to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hardened by the past no more My answers have been restored Forgiveness flows from Your veins Your kindness shown in all Your ways We sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's never been anyone like You There's never been anyone like You are worthy, You are worthy Never been anyone like You Never been anyone like You You are worthy, You are worthy

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You're always rising like the sun The old is gone, the new has come I fix my eyes on Christ alone My Rock, my Shield, my Cornerstone We sing

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: God is so good God is so good God is so good He's so good to me (oh, You are)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: God, You are good God, You are good God, You're so good You're so good to me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Set my eyes on You alone My Rock, my Shield, my Cornerstone

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh-o-o-oh, o-o-oh Oh-o-o-oh, o-o-oh Good, always good, always good God, You are good, You are always good

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: God, You're so good, always good God, You're so good, always good God, You're so good, always good God, You're so good, always good

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: God, You're so good, always good We sing

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: God is so good He's so good to me God, You're so good You're so good to me
